title: jatropha lobata subsp. senegalensis
intro: Jatropha lobata subsp. senegalensis, also known as Jatropha senegalensis, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly found in West Africa. The medicinal properties of Jatropha senegalensis include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its rich content of alkaloids, flavonoids, and glycosides. The health benefits of this plant include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which help to reduce pain and inflammation, fight infections, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Jatropha senegalensis can be made into infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
